title: galium lucidum var. tenuifolium
intro: Galium lucidum var. tenuifolium, also known as the slender-leaved bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium lucidum plant, a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Galium lucidum var. tenuifolium include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
